claim_boundary: This audit checks Stage-1 tracking implementation contracts. It does not certify a paper-level teacher, VAE, diffusion, guidance controller, Isaac rendered video, or real robot result.
immediate_conclusion: Official/public tracking code and the 4/7 paper-contract wrapper largely match the paper formulas, but current teacher checkpoints still fail quality gates. Two paper-vs-public-code cautions remain: adaptive sampling kernel K=1 in public code vs K=3 in supplement, and ankle-special joint offset described in text but not implemented in the public config. The 5/6 multisource summary also has a metadata flag mismatch for the USD source.

blocking_or_high_rows.paper_contract: Only low-done, low-error, continuous teacher rollouts should feed VAE/diffusion
blocking_or_high_rows.local_value: No downstream-ready teacher checkpoint exists after current sweeps
blocking_or_high_rows.required_action: Do not start final VAE/diffusion training or success videos until this gate passes.

blocking_or_high_rows.paper_contract: Good motion data and paper formulas are necessary but not sufficient; eval must prove policy quality
blocking_or_high_rows.official_code_value: Official/public code contract mostly matches, with two paper-vs-public-code cautions
blocking_or_high_rows.local_value: selector proves all current teachers remain below downstream quality gate
blocking_or_high_rows.required_action: Next work should target why body/joint errors remain high: adaptive K=3/ankle offset ablations, motion scale/order, reset sampling, and eval per-motion failure bins.

rows.component: PD natural frequency and damping ratio
rows.paper_contract: S1: omega = 10 Hz, damping ratio zeta = 2
rows.required_action: Keep this unchanged for any future teacher training.
MuJoCo adapter must use this exact exported scale/joint order, not hand-set scale.

rows.paper_contract: S1/Table joint armature: reflected rotor inertia; ankle/waist pitch/roll doubled
rows.official_code_value: ARMATURE_5020/7520_14/7520_22/4010 present; feet and waist use 2.0 multiplier
rows.required_action: Do not zero or tune armature for stability; paper says wrong armature degrades tracking.

rows.paper_contract: Gaussian exp(-MSE/std^2), body terms weight 1, anchor optional 0.5, action/contact -0.1, joint limit -10
rows.official_code_value: Official env/rewards.py match exp formula and weights
rows.local_value: paper-contract wrapper imports official G1FlatEnvCfg; no reward override detected
rows.required_action: If teacher remains weak, inspect motion/termination/curriculum before changing reward weights.

rows.paper_contract: Terminate on anchor/end-effector z error > 0.25m or anchor orientation > 0.8
rows.official_code_value: Official uses z-only anchor_pos, z-only ankle/wrist ee_body_pos, anchor_ori threshold 0.8
rows.required_action: Do not relax endpoint termination and call it paper-level; use relaxations only as diagnostics.

rows.paper_contract: S1 prose says most joints U[-0.01,0.01], ankle joints U[-0.1,0.1]; table only lists U[-0.01,0.01]
rows.official_code_value: Official public code randomizes all joints U[-0.01,0.01]; no ankle-special branch found
rows.local_value: local training inherits official public code; no ankle-special patch
rows.required_action: Record as paper-vs-public-code ambiguity. If trying to improve ankle/single-leg stability, run a clearly labeled ankle-offset ablation, not an unmarked paper-contract run.

rows.paper_contract: S1 says non-causal exponential kernel rho=0.8, u in {0,1,2}, K=3
rows.official_code_value: Official MotionCommandCfg adaptive_kernel_size=1.0, adaptive_lambda=0.8, alpha=0.001, uniform=0.1
rows.local_value: local training inherits official public code; no K=3 patch
rows.required_action: Likely important for hard segments. Add explicit K=3 ablation or patch only in a named non-official run.

rows.paper_contract: friction/restitution, joint offsets, torso COM, root velocity push
rows.official_code_value: Official env cfg matches friction/rest/COM/push ranges; joint offset caveat above
rows.local_value: local training uses official env cfg with debug_vis disabled only
rows.required_action: Keep compact DR; do not add delay randomization unless labeled as ablation.

rows.paper_contract: actor: psi, anchor error, IMU twist, theta-theta0, theta_dot, a_last; no temporal history
rows.official_code_value: Official policy obs terms present; critic adds body_pos/body_ori; observed run dims 160/286
rows.required_action: MuJoCo PPO adapter must recreate this exact 160-dim order and normalization.

rows.paper_contract: Official whole_body_tracking G1FlatPPORunnerCfg, 30k iterations, save every 500
rows.official_code_value: Official PPO cfg matches expected values
rows.required_action: Checkpoint selector should choose best eval checkpoint, not last.

rows.paper_contract: Unitree G1 29 DoF, 40 links/bodies, inertial/mesh/contact compatible with official tracking
rows.official_code_value: physical asset audit status=ok_with_physical_contract_ready_for_converter_scaffold, skeleton ok=True, physical_fidelity_complete=False
rows.local_value: training swaps official URDF spawn for local official-importer-export USD spawn
rows.required_action: This is a local asset adaptation. Keep claiming local public-resource training, not official checkpoint.

rows.paper_contract: Training summaries must truthfully distinguish official-code parameters from local asset/data adaptations
rows.official_code_value: Paper-contract 4/7 rank metrics correctly mark official importer USD; 5/6 inherited base flag says resource_adjusted_usd=True
rows.required_action: Patch multisource summary metadata in the next cleanup so report readers are not misled.

rows.paper_contract: Only low-done, low-error, continuous teacher rollouts should feed VAE/diffusion
rows.local_value: No downstream-ready teacher checkpoint exists after current sweeps
rows.required_action: Do not start final VAE/diffusion training or success videos until this gate passes.

rows.paper_contract: Endpoint threshold changes are diagnostics only unless explicitly named
rows.official_code_value: Base worker supports BM_EE_BODY_POS_TRAIN_THRESHOLD environment patch
rows.local_value: current paper-contract rank metrics report ee_body_pos_threshold_patch_applied=False
rows.required_action: Keep the env var unset for paper-contract training; if used, write a separate ablation row.

rows.paper_contract: Good motion data and paper formulas are necessary but not sufficient; eval must prove policy quality
